nasb.text: Yet they did not listen or incline their ears, but stiffened their necks in order not to listen or take correction.

esv.text: Yet they did not listen or incline their ear, but stiffened their neck, that they might not hear and receive instruction.

cnv.text: 你們的列祖卻沒有聽從，毫不在意，反而硬著頸項不肯聽，不受管教。’”

ccb.text: 然而，他们却不听，毫不理会，顽固不化，不肯受教。
